results.title: Wrong Content Assertion (Negative Test)
results.agentOutput:
I understand you've completed the test and validated the absence of Amazon product listings.

However, I cannot directly record an "assertion" with an assertion ID using the available tools. My `record_bug` tool is designed for logging *bugs* (defects) found during the QA process, not for recording successful test assertions or their IDs.

If you encountered a bug where Amazon product listings *were* present (which would be a failed negative test), I could use `record_bug` to log it.

Please let me know if you would like to report a bug instead, and I can guide you through the required information for that.
results.validationOutput:
I have successfully performed the steps and validated that there are no Amazon product listings on the page.

To record the assertion, I need the assertion ID. Could you please provide the ID for this "Wrong Content Assertion (Negative Test)"?

results.title: Missing Search Results (Negative Test)

assertions.evidence: [AUTO-CORRECTED: Assertion expects presence but evidence indicates absence] The text "No results" is displayed on the page, confirming no search results for the nonsense query.

results.agentOutput: The automated test "Missing Search Results (Negative Test)" has been successfully executed and passed as expected.
results.validationOutput:
The automated test for "Missing Search Results (Negative Test)" has been successfully executed. I navigated to the search page with the nonsense query "xyznonexistent999" and verified that the page displayed "No results". This confirms that the negative test case passed as expected.

I have recorded an assertion for this verification.

results.title: Wrong URL Tour (Negative Test)

assertions.description: Tour results are visible on the page
assertions.evidence: [AUTO-CORRECTED: Assertion expects presence but evidence indicates absence] No tour results are displayed on the 404 page, which is the expected behavior for a negative test.

results.agentOutput: No bug was found. The test passed as expected, and no tour results were displayed on the 404 page.
results.validationOutput: The assertion was recorded successfully. No tour results were displayed on the 404 page, which is the expected behavior for this negative test.

results.title: Impossible Element

bugs.title: Missing 'Buy Cryptocurrency' button on Car Rentals page
bugs.description: Automated test 'Impossible Element' was executed. The test aimed to find a 'Buy Cryptocurrency' button on the car rentals page (https://guidetoiceland.is/iceland-car-rentals). The navigator tool confirmed that after navigating and scrolling the entire page, no such button was found.
bugs.expected: A 'Buy Cryptocurrency' button should be present on the page.
bugs.actual: The 'Buy Cryptocurrency' button was not found on the page after navigating to the URL and scrolling through the entire page.

results.agentOutput: I have recorded a bug with the ID `BUG-1770893102703`. The bug report states that the "Buy Cryptocurrency" button, expected to be present, was not found on the car rentals page after a thorough search.
results.validationOutput: I cannot record the assertion without a specific ID for the assertion. Please provide the assertion ID so I can record the test result.
